source.multipart_basis: Decomposition inferred from the original prompt; no rulebook citations added beyond those carried by the original sample.

full_prompt:
Design the release hinge mechanism for a single-panel 1.2 m x 0.8 m spacecraft solar array per NASA-STD-5017B (2022-12-06), delivered as a multi-part assembly because the torque-margin, deployment-kinematics, latch-in-impact, and bearing-capacity pass/fail all reference coupled interfaces between the two titanium hinge leaves, the hinge pin, the two dry-lubricated ball bearings, the torsion spring, and the eddy-current damper. NASA-STD-5017B Section 4.2.4 requires >= 100 % torque margin over resisting torque sum at worst case, and Section 4.7 requires >= 4x life factor.

Assembly layout. (A) Hinge leaves (x2): Ti-6Al-4V plates, one fixed to the spacecraft bus and one fixed to the array backside, each carrying a bore for the hinge pin and the two ball bearings. (B) Hinge pin: Ti-6Al-4V, 8 mm diameter x 60 mm long, transferring the latch-in impact load between leaves. (C) Ball bearings (x2): deep-groove SKF-style, ID 8 mm / OD 22 mm / width 7 mm, dry MoS2 lubed, pressed into the leaves. (D) Torsion spring: 302 SS music wire, mean coil 18 mm / wire 2 mm / 15 active coils, delivering 1.0 N*m at stowed 0 deg and 0.4 N*m at deployed 90 deg. (E) Eddy-current rotary damper: coefficient 0.05 N*m*s/rad, inline with the hinge axis. (F) Launch-restraint pin interface: pyro-actuated pin puller external to the hinge, treated as a boolean state for this analysis.

Panel inertia. Array panel + substrate 3.5 kg; J about hinge axis = (1/3) * 3.5 * 1.2^2 = 1.68 kg*m^2.

Resisting torques at worst-case (cold, end-of-life, bearing contaminated). T_harness = 0.08 N*m, T_bearing_friction = 0.05 N*m, T_detent = 0.02 N*m at 0 deg then 0 N*m. Sum T_resist = 0.15 N*m stowed / 0.13 N*m past detent.

Deployment budget. <= 120 s to 90 deg; latch-in velocity 3-15 deg/s.

Pass/fail criteria (assembly-level). (R1) Torque margin (T_avail - T_resist) / T_resist >= 1.0 at every angle per NASA-STD-5017B 4.2.4. (R2) Life-test cycles >= 80 per Section 4.7 (20 ground + 4 TVAC x 4x factor). (R3) Deployment time <= 120 s from ODE integration of J*theta_ddot = T_spring(theta) - T_resist - c*theta_dot. (R4) Latch-in velocity at 90 deg in [3, 15] deg/s. (R5) Hinge pin max von Mises at latch-in impact (0.5 * J * omega^2 dissipated in the pin shear plane) <= Fty_Ti / 1.25 = 688 MPa. (R6) Bearing rated static capacity >= 5 x launch inertia load = 5 * 3.5 * 30 * 9.81 = 5150 N per NASA-STD-5017B static-load factor.

Assembly policy. Every pass/fail references the assembled kinematic chain: the torque balance couples torsion spring (D), damper (E), bearings (C), and harness/detent acting between leaves (A); pin stress (R5) loads B through interfaces with A and C; bearing R6 depends on the launch inertia carried through A-C interface.

Solver and analysis expectations. Primary: (a) closed-form torque margin at 0/30/60/90 deg (R1); (b) ODE integration of the rotary EOM for R3 and R4; (c) linear-static FEM of hinge pin at latch-in with TET10 mesh 0.5 mm at shear plane (R5); (d) bearing capacity lookup for R6. Structural FEM required for R5 only; thermal, fluid, vibration, ionizing-radiation, and buckling NOT required.

Deliverables. STEP AP242 of hinge assembly, torque margin table vs angle, deployment theta(t) trace, latch-in velocity in deg/s, pin peak von Mises in MPa, and bearing static-capacity margin.
short_prompt:
Design the release hinge mechanism for a single-panel 1.2 x 0.8 m spacecraft solar array per NASA-STD-5017B (2022-12-06), delivered as a multi-part assembly: two Ti-6Al-4V hinge leaves + a Ti-6Al-4V hinge pin (8 mm dia x 60 mm) + two dry-MoS2-lubed deep-groove ball bearings (ID 8 / OD 22 / w 7) + a 302 SS torsion spring (mean coil 18 mm, wire 2 mm, 15 active coils, 1.0 N*m stowed / 0.4 N*m at 90 deg) + an eddy-current rotary damper (0.05 N*m*s/rad) + a pyro launch-restraint pin-puller interface (external).

Panel inertia. 3.5 kg array + substrate, J_hinge = (1/3) * 3.5 * 1.2^2 = 1.68 kg*m^2.

Worst-case resisting torques (cold, EOL, bearing contaminated): T_harness 0.08 N*m, T_bearing 0.05 N*m, T_detent 0.02 N*m stowed; sum 0.15 N*m stowed / 0.13 N*m past detent.

Deployment budget: <= 120 s to 90 deg; latch-in velocity 3-15 deg/s.

Pass limits (NASA-STD-5017B 4.2.4 and 4.7): torque margin (T_avail - T_resist)/T_resist >= 1.0 at every angle; life cycles >= 80 (20 ground + 4 TVAC x 4x); deployment time <= 120 s; latch-in velocity in [3, 15] deg/s; pin von Mises at latch-in <= Fty_Ti / 1.25 = 688 MPa; bearing rated static >= 5 * 3.5 * 30 * 9.81 = 5150 N.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: Deployment kinematics require ODE integration of torque balance.

prompt.title: Solar-array launch-restraint hinge per NASA-STD-5017B as multi-part assembly
prompt.brief: Ti hinge leaves + pin + ball bearings + torsion spring + eddy damper deploying 3.5 kg array in <=120 s with >=100% torque margin and bounded latch-in velocity.

parts.name: hinge_leaf
parts.role: Ti-6Al-4V leaf fixed to spacecraft bus or array backside, hosting bearing bores

parts.name: hinge_pin
parts.role: Ti pin transferring latch-in impact between leaves

parts.name: ball_bearing
parts.role: deep-groove ball bearing pressed into a leaf, dry MoS2 lubed

parts.name: torsion_spring
parts.role: 302 SS music-wire torsion spring providing deployment torque

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: 5x launch inertia per NASA-STD-5017B static-load factor
Generated coverage gate: ensures prompt-level envelope, body-count, report-field, and part geometry constraints are represented by an explicit geometry audit experiment.

interfaces.load_path: reaction of panel inertia and spring torque through bearing to leaf

interfaces.mediated_by: clearance fit with MoS2 dry lube
interfaces.load_path: rotary friction torque + latch-in shear into pin
deployment torque applied across both leaves

fem_check_policy.rationale: Torque margin (R1) is a balance of spring (D), damper (E), bearing friction (C), and harness/detent acting between leaves (A); deployment ODE (R3, R4) integrates J*theta_ddot = T_spring - T_resist - c*theta_dot across the full chain; pin stress (R5) depends on J*omega^2 input from the panel+leaves acting through C into B. No single part has meaningful pass/fail.

notes.why_multi_part_is_inherent: NASA-STD-5017B specifies release mechanisms as assemblies of moving parts; torque margin and life test are per-mechanism not per-part.

exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Launch vibration enveloped by quasi-static 30 g bearing load.
exclusions_explained.thermal_analysis: Cold-case friction increase rolled into degradation factor.

out_of_scope_but_real_world_needed: Pyro pin puller qualification per NASA-STD-5017B Section 4.8
Harness stiffness measurement at cold temperature

eval_coverage: NASA-STD-5017B 100% torque margin across assembled chain
rotary EOM ODE integration on full assembly
bearing static capacity 5x launch inertia at leaf-pin interface

generated_eval_coverage.purpose: Add runnable CCX coverage kit for JSON-only multipart prompt.
generated_eval_coverage.note: Generated checks assert solver coverage for every FEA-grade requirement, every declared load case, and prompt-level geometry constraints; they are not a domain-specific certification model.
